description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust metallic barrel and receiver, complemented by a wooden full stock and fore-end. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a smooth, unvented top and a wide muzzle opening. The receiver is metallic and seamlessly connects to the wooden stock, which is ergonomically shaped with visible wood grain and a slightly curved butt. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for grip and slides along the barrel, indicating pump-action functionality. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with a blend of metal and wood materials typical of classic shotguns used in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long metallic barrel, wooden full stock, and ribbed wooden fore-end, blending classic metal and wood construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel, with the ribbed fore-end visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other side of the wooden stock, fore-end, and metallic barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with a smooth, unvented top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
